mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tenant_model_price(tenant_id, tenant_model_id, currency_code, input_price_per_million, output_price_per_million, cache_write_price_per_million, cache_read_price_per_million, version, effective_at, expired_at, created_by, created_at) VALUES(#{tenantId}, #{tenantModelId}, #{currencyCode}, #{inputPricePerMillion}, #{outputPricePerMillion}, #{cacheWritePricePerMillion}, #{cacheReadPricePerMillion}, #{version}, NOW(), NULL, #{createdBy}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE tenant_model_price SET expired_at = NOW() WHERE tenant_model_id = #{tenantModelId} AND expired_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, tenant_model_id, currency_code, input_price_per_million, output_price_per_million, cache_write_price_per_million, cache_read_price_per_million, version, effective_at, expired_at, created_at FROM tenant_model_price WHERE tenant_model_id = #{tenantModelId} AND expired_at IS NULL

SELECT id, tenant_id, tenant_model_id, currency_code, input_price_per_million, output_price_per_million, cache_write_price_per_million, cache_read_price_per_million, version, effective_at, expired_at, created_at FROM tenant_model_price WHERE tenant_model_id = #{tenantModelId} ORDER BY version DESC, id DESC
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(version), 0) FROM tenant_model_price WHERE tenant_model_id = #{tenantModelId}
